LanguageData.UB_Seal_SmallGameHunter.title: hunter
LanguageData.UB_Seal_SmallGameHunter.description: [PAWN_nameDef] hunted small game to bring meat back to [PAWN_possessive] village. Each week, [PAWN_pronoun] wandered in the forest, placed traps and used [PAWN_possessive] bow to kill birds, rodents and occasionally boars.
LanguageData.UB_Seal_Draughtmaker.title: draughtmaker
LanguageData.UB_Seal_Draughtmaker.description: [PAWN_nameDef] created all sorts of potions for [PAWN_possessive] fellow tribe members. Mixing herbs, mushrooms and animal secretion, [PAWN_pronoun] claimed that [PAWN_possessive] elixirs could heal wounds and illnesses, but they were only popular because of their enjoyable side effects.
LanguageData.UB_Seal_Ambusher.title: ambusher
LanguageData.UB_Seal_Ambusher.description: As one of the best archers of [PAWN_possessive] tribe, [PAWN_nameDef] lurked in the woods to fend off any dangerous intruder. Hiding high in the trees, [PAWN_pronoun] could stay hours in ambush, observing the surroundings in search of any trespasser.
LanguageData.UB_Seal_WarriorPoet.title: warrior poet
LanguageData.UB_Seal_WarriorPoet.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a great fighter. [PAWN_pronoun] defeated many enemies and told everyone about [PAWN_possessive] accomplishments. [PAWN_pronoun] always added new elements in [PAWN_possessive] stories to make them feel grander, at the price of them being often less believable.\n\n[PAWN_nameDef] created a whole poetic saga about [PAWN_objective] and [PAWN_possessive] trusty spear.
